title: Tame Phantom
description: Feed phantoms rotten flesh to tame them and gain a loyal flying pets. Your pet will defend you from attackers. Recall tamed phantoms using a Phantom Whistle.
body:
# Tameable Phantoms

Turn one of Minecraft's most feared nighttime predators into a loyal companion.

**Feed** a phantom **rotten flesh** to tame it and gain a faithful flying ally that will follow and protect you on your adventures. Recall your tamed phantoms at any time using a **Phantom Whistle**. Tamed phantoms have bright **yellow eyes**, can be **healed by feeding** them, and will swoop down to **defend their owner** from attackers.

### Features

* Tame phantoms using rotten flesh
* Tamed phantoms have distinctive yellow eyes
* Eye color becomes whiter as health decreases
* Heal your phantom by feeding it
* Loyal companions that follow their owner
* Swoop around their owner and occasionally hover nearby
* Automatically teleport to their owner if separated
* Recall pet phantoms and make them stay in place using a Phantom Whistle
* Defend their owner from hostile mobs and attackers
* Tamed phantoms do not attack other players unless provoked
* Remain active during the day and are immune to sunlight

### Taming

* Each piece of rotten flesh has a 10% chance to tame a phantom
* Wild phantoms emit dark purple particles when fed
* Tamed phantoms emit dark blue particles when fed
* Tamed phantoms very rarely screech or shriek
* Name-tagged phantoms will not despawn

### Phantom Whistle

Craft a Phantom Whistle to tell your pet phantoms to 'sit'. Useful when you want to keep your pet at home, protect it, or simply want it to stay.

* Instantly teleports nearby tamed phantoms to their owner
* Phantoms appear just above the player's head, provided there is enough space
* Recalled phantoms hover in place and stop following their owner
* Phantoms remain there until released with a right-click
* Phantom Whistle can be crafted using two skeleton bones

### Multiplayer

Install the mod on both the server and client. The mod also works in singleplayer.

Whether you're exploring, building a base, or traveling through the wilderness, your phantom will always be close by and ready to come to your defense.


### Sound Credits:
Phantom Whistle sounds are clips from [an audio by UmbreOnline](https://pixabay.com/sound-effects/film-special-effects-resonant-deep-conch-note-echoing-briefly-across-open-water-333106/)
